sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19336" key="ba/rac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βάραξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ακος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n19336.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cake,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0453.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βήρηξ.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
